biological_replicate: The G-patch protein Spp2 from Saccharomyces cerevisiae (scSpp2)
technical_replicate: CD measurements were performed with scSpp210–150
experimental_design: To test the contribution of each of these parts to the binding of ctSpp2G-patch to ctPrp2, we performed binding affinity experiments
number_of_fractions: five different crystal forms (CF1 to CF5) of this ctPrp2-ctSpp2211–254 complex
